summary: Continue path goes to HubAntre.tscn correctly but run_state not explicitly restored. MerlinStore not autoloaded → LOAD_PROFILE may silently fail.

checks.check: SelectionSauvegarde goes to HubAntre.tscn on continue
checks.evidence: SelectionSauvegarde.gd:4 — GAME_SCENE = 'res://scenes/HubAntre.tscn'. Both _auto_continue and _on_continue_pressed use this.
SelectionSauvegarde.gd:100 dispatches LOAD_PROFILE via MerlinStore. But MerlinStore NOT in project.godot autoloads. get_node_or_null('/root/MerlinStore') likely null → fallback to UI shown.
project.godot autoloads section: ScreenFrame, SFXManager, MerlinVisual, PixelTransition, etc. NO MerlinStore. Without HubAntre or game_manager pre-spawning it, dispatch is a no-op.

checks.check: run_state restored before entering run scene
checks.evidence: SelectionSauvegarde → HubAntre. HubAntre.gd has no run_state read on _ready(). MerlinSaveSystem.load_run_state() is defined but not called in HubAntre. run_state resumption path unclear.
merlin_save_system.gd:222 — _validate_run_state() called on load. Validation fails → returns empty dict (safe). No corruption path.
SelectionSauvegarde.gd:202 — PixelTransition.transition_to(scene_path). PixelTransition IS in autoloads. ResourceLoader.exists() checked first.

root_cause: MerlinStore not autoloaded → LOAD_PROFILE silently fails in SelectionSauvegarde. HubAntre doesn't read run_state on entry.
